## PLAYWRIGHT CONFIGURATION

projects: [
  { name: 'chromium', viewport: Desktop Chrome },
  { name: 'mobile-small', viewport: { width: 375, height: 667 } },
  { name: 'mobile', viewport: { width: 768, height: 1024 } },
  { name: 'tablet', viewport: { width: 1024, height: 768 } }
]

---

## TEST EXECUTION

### Run All Tests
```bash
npx playwright test
```

### Run Specific Category
```bash
# Admin pages
npx playwright test admin-pages-coverage.spec.ts

# Portal pages
npx playwright test portal-pages-coverage.spec.ts

# Responsive tests
npx playwright test responsive-e2e.spec.ts

# New coverage tests
npx playwright test remaining-pages-coverage-v2.spec.ts
```

### Generate HTML Report
```bash
npx playwright test --reporter=html
npx playwright show-report
```
